settings.title: Monster Piercing | Gold Nose Hoops
settings.text:
Welcome to our Gold Nose Hoops Collection, where everyday elegance meets genuine craftsmanship. Each piece is made from real 9K and 14K solid gold, designed to give you that effortless shine and comfort you can wear all day.

We’re so proud to offer authentic gold jewellery at the best possible prices, and honestly, some people can’t believe it’s real gold...but it is! Our hoops are dainty, minimal, and hypoallergenic, making them perfect for sensitive skin and everyday wear.

Whether you love a tiny seamless hoop, a classic clicker ring, or something with a little more shine, you’ll find your perfect match here. Every gold hoop is made to look beautiful, feel comfortable, and last a lifetime.

Explore the collection and discover why our solid gold nose hoops are a customer favourite for their luxury, quality, and unbeatable value.

settings.question: What’st he difference between bendable, open, and clicker hoops?
settings.answer:
• Bendable hoops (also called seamless rings) are thin and flexible, allowing you to gently twist them open and closed by hand.
  • Open hoops have a small gap and are designed for easy insertion without fully closing the circle.
  • Clicker hoops feature a hinged clasp that securely clicks shut, offering a seamless look and easy wear.

settings.question: Are your gold nose hoops safe for new or healing piercings?
settings.answer: Most of our 14K gold nose hoops are suitable for healed piercings. For fresh or newly pierced noses, we recommend implant-grade titanium until the piercing is fully healed, then switching to gold for long-term wear.

settings.question: How do I choose the right size or diameter for my nose hoop?
settings.answer: The most common sizes for nose hoops range between 6mm and 8mm in inner diameter. The correct size depends on the placement and thickness of your nostril. If unsure, ask your piercer for your exact measurements before ordering.

settings.question: Can I wear my gold nose hoop every day?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Our 14K gold nose hoops are designed for daily wear. They’re hypoallergenic, resistant to tarnish, and comfortable enough to keep in during sleep or showers.
